text:
is a fictional character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. He is a member of the WILLE organization.

Profile

Koji Takao is a bald, imposing man with a goatee and is the ship's engineer. He controls the engine ignition sequence. He is a friend of Ryoji Kaji and seems to know Misato Katsuragi's reckless strategies well and judge her as an "interesting captain". His personality seems calm. When Misato Katsuragi orders them to fly and fight the Nemesis series, few crew members are afraid of dying, but Koji comments that you will die when you die, making Midori Kitakami wonder how is he still alive at that age with this mentality.
